articles.title: Explained: Why global brokerages are hitting panic button on India. FII exodus, oil shock ringing alarm?
articles.description: Equity market has shifted sharply from optimism to crisis mode, marked by a record $13 billion FII outflow in March—the worst ever. The sell-off has been driven by a surge in oil prices following Gulf tensions, with Brent crude jumping over 50%, worsening inflation, trade deficits, and corporate margins. Existing weaknesses like a weak rupee, sluggish earnings, high valuations, and global trade pressures have compounded the impact, turning investor sentiment from an “India premium” to an “India exit.”

articles.description: Party alleges Suresh Gopi has done ‘nothing’ for the people of Thrissur constituency despite making ‘grand promises’ during election campaign

articles.title: Middle East Conflict: Trump considers pulling US out of NATO, calls the alliance ‘paper tiger’
articles.description: US President Donald Trump on Wednesday (local time) said that he is strongly considering pulling Washington out of the North Atlantic Treaty Organization (NATO), the Daily Telegraph reported.

articles.title: Israel kills 7 people in Beirut, Hezbollah fights invasion in south Lebanon
articles.description: The Israeli military says it aimed to kill a senior Hezbollah commander as it launched its latest attacks on Beirut.

articles.title: Passage of ‘Amaravati Bill’ in Lok Sabha a historic moment: Lokesh
articles.description: He stated that the Andhra Pradesh (AP) Legislative Assembly previously passed a unanimous resolution designating Amaravati as the Capital and the approval of the above Bill made the five crore people of AP extremely happy

articles.title: CoinDCX launches ₹100 crore cybersecurity network after impersonation-linked controversy
articles.description: CoinDCX co-founders Sumit Gupta and Neeraj Khandelwal spoke about their arrests and announced the launch of the ₹100 crore Digital Suraksha Network to support independent research, new standards, and educational tools for both state cybercrime cells and everyday Indian users

articles.title: With NavIC setback, India unable to use satellite system for security purposes: experts
articles.description: A major setback occurred after the last atomic clock on board the Indian Regional Navigational Satellite System-1F (IRNSS-1F) stopped functioning on March 10, leaving only three satellites of the NavIC constellation in function; armed forces of countries use the navigation satellite system for logistics, mapping and operational planning, and relying on a foreign navigation satellite system could pose security issues, especially during wars

articles.title: Australia-Born Ryan Williams On Scoring For India: "Dreamt About This"
articles.description: Williams was included in India's squad after FIFA cleared his change of association.

topStories.description: US President Donald Trump on Wednesday (local time) said that he is strongly considering pulling Washington out of the North Atlantic Treaty Organization (NATO), the Daily Telegraph reported.

topStories.title: Which teams are in the FIFA World Cup 2026?
topStories.description: A breakdown of the teams and groups of the FIFA World Cup in Canada, Mexico and the US after the final playoffs.

topStories.title: MLA Calls For Mandatory Drug Tests For Actors Ahead Of Film Releases
topStories.description: The Congress MLA said that film stars have greater influence over the public than politicians.

topStories.title: Assembly Election LIVE: Will implement Uniform Civil Code, safeguard tribals to protect Assam’s identity, says PM Modi
topStories.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi alleged that the Congress, if it comes to power in Assam, will bring in a law to protect infiltrators, which the BJP and its allies will not allow

topStories.title: Three Teens Facing Terrorism Charges Over BofA Bombing Attempt
topStories.description: French prosecutors are seeking terrorism charges against an adult and three teens aged 16-17 over a foiled bombing attack near the Bank of America Corp. office in Paris, seen as a likely retaliation to the war with Iran.

topStories.title: Lawyer for 1984 riot victims, ex-AAP MLA HS Phoolka joins BJP
topStories.description: Padma Shri lawyer HS Phoolka joins BJP, recalls 1984 anti-Sikh riots and decades-long legal battle against Congress leaders Sajjan Kumar, Jagdish Tytler.

topStories.title: US messages via Witkoff and intermediaries are not negotiations: Araghchi
topStories.description: Iran's foreign minister says message exchanges continue with Washington, but insists there are no negotiations or trust.

topStories.description: The PM alleged that the Congress was preparing to introduce a law that would unfairly target the majority community.

topStories.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer will address the nation on the Middle East conflict and rising living costs at 10 AM local time.

topStories.title: ‘BJP loot diwas’: Congress slams price hike of essential commodities
topStories.description: Congress president Mallikarjun Kharge said while the common citizens are hoping for relief, the BJP leadership remains entirely focused on "looting the public and plundering the nation amidst this crisis"

topStories.description: Trump says US could leave Iran war in 2-3 weeks without a deal; Iran’s FM Araghchi says he has no faith in talks.

topStories.title: Oil slides 4% to below $100/bbl as Middle East uncertainty keeps markets on edge
topStories.description: Oil prices experienced a significant drop of over 4% as Middle East tensions continued to influence markets, despite indications of a potential easing of the U.S.-Iran conflict. Investors locked in gains amid uncertainty, with analysts noting that even if the conflict ends, supply chain normalization and infrastructure damage will likely keep prices elevated.

dailyNews.description: Michigan Rep. Karen Whitsett says her Christian faith is incompatible with today's Democratic Party, citing abortion and LGBTQ policies as she exits elected office.

dailyNews.title: President Trump says US could finish Iran operation within two to three weeks
dailyNews.description: United States President Donald Trump indicated on Tuesday that he thinks America will be finished with attacks on Iran in two to three weeks.

dailyNews.description: Birth tourism is a booming concierge industry as Trump's Executive Order 14160 on birthright citizenship faces a Supreme Court challenge in a major case.

dailyNews.description: Operation Epic Fury lacks a political end state one month in, as Iran's regime endures and the Strait of Hormuz remains contested.

dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court weighs Trump's executive order on birthright citizenship, examining the Fourteenth Amendment's meaning and its application to children of illegal immigrants.

dailyNews.description: President Trump spoke about his ballroom’s security features as he argued against a judge’s orders to stop construction.

dailyNews.title: Trump Signs Order Seeking Federal Control of Mail Voting as He Promotes False Claims
dailyNews.description: Election experts and Democratic officials called the order legally invalid, and Arizona and Oregon pledged to immediately challenge it in court.

dailyNews.title: Justice Dept. Struggles to Respond to Trump’s Suit Against IRS
dailyNews.description: Officials at the department and the White House are in the middle of a messy and complicated debate over how to respond to President Trump’s lawsuit demanding $10 billion from the I.R.S.

dailyNews.title: Judge Approves Trump Effort to Obtain List of Jews From University of Pennsylvania
dailyNews.description: The government’s effort to collect the names and phone numbers of Jewish people on campus as it investigates antisemitism has upset some people who worry about how the information will be used.

dailyNews.title: Padma Lakshmi: The Decision That Would Create a Permanent American Underclass
dailyNews.description: President Trump wants to take away a fundamental American promise.

dailyNews.description: The “Late Show” host joked that “Trump attacked Iran” after ABC scrapped the reality show’s latest season.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court to hear arguments in birthright citizenship case today
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court will convene for arguments Wednesday to consider the legality of President Trump's executive order that seeks to end birthright citizenship.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran war could wrap up in 2-3 weeks as gas prices rise
dailyNews.description: President Trump indicated the Iran war may wrap up "very soon" and he could abandon efforts to force Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, as the war pushed U.S. gas prices over the $4 mark.

dailyNews.title: Trump to give "important update on Iran" tonight in prime-time speech
dailyNews.description: President Trump is planning to deliver a prime-time address Wednesday night to "provide an important update on Iran," the White House said, as the president faces critical decisions in the monthlong war.

dailyNews.title: Trump plans to attend Supreme Court arguments in birthright citizenship case
dailyNews.description: President Trump is planning to go to the Supreme Court on Wednesday as the justices take up his executive order seeking to end birthright citizenship, a major test of his immigration agenda.

dailyNews.title: Judge orders Trump admin. to restore legal status of migrants allowed in under Biden
dailyNews.description: A federal judge directed the Trump administration to restore the legal status of migrants allowed into the U.S. under a now-defunct Biden administration program for asylum-seekers who arrived at the southern border.

dailyNews.title: 3/5: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: President Trump ousts Kristi Noem as DHS Secretary; Trump picks Sen. Mullin (R-OK) to replace Noem
